normalized_title: City of Fremantle Local Planning Policy 2.18 - New Residential Developments in the City Centre Zone - Noise from an Existing Source
scope_summary: Applies to all new residential development in the City Centre zone under Local Planning Scheme No. 4 that is in close proximity to existing non-residential noise-producing uses. Requires noise attenuation design measures across three categories (external openings, external walls, floors/ceilings) per Appendix 1, with variation possible via an acoustic engineer's report demonstrating equivalent or better attenuation. Also mandates a Section 70A Transfer of Land Act 1893 notification on the Certificate of Title of every dwelling prior to occupation.

key_numeric_standards.unit: mm (sealed thickened laminated glass replacing standard 6mm)
key_numeric_standards.applies_to: windows and glazed doors in new City Centre residential development

key_numeric_standards.unit: mm laminated pane with 100mm air gap to other pane
key_numeric_standards.applies_to: windows and glazed doors (alternative to 10mm laminated glass)
external walls of new City Centre residential development

key_numeric_standards.unit: mm (with carpet, acoustically installed timber flooring or tiles)
